title: Greenwayodendron usambaricum
taxonomy: Greenwayodendron usambaricum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the Usambara Mountains in Tanzania, East Africa. The classification of Greenwayodendron usambaricum includes its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, and its class as Rosopsida. Its order is Sapindales, and its family is Sapindaceae. The genus name Greenwayodendron is derived from its discoverer, the British botanist William Gerald Walther Greenway.
